exchangeItems.title: Vintage leather bag
exchangeItems.description: Used twice, great condition. Looking to swap or give away.

exchangeItems.title: Stack of design books
exchangeItems.description: 5 books on UX/UI design. Free to a good home.

exchangeItems.title: Bamboo kitchen utensils set
exchangeItems.description: Complete set, barely used. Great for eco-conscious cooks.

communities.name: Zero Waste Melbourne
communities.description: Local community for zero waste living and swap events in Melbourne. We meet monthly to swap goods and share tips for reducing household waste.
communities.recentActivity: Swap event this Saturday at Fitzroy

communities.name: Repair Café Network
communities.description: Share repair skills and fix items together instead of throwing them away. Welcoming people of all skill levels — if you can sew, solder, or just help out, join us.

communities.name: Minimalists Together
communities.description: A supportive space for people on their decluttering journey. Share your wins, ask for advice, and find motivation from a community that gets it.

communities.name: Slow Fashion Collective
communities.description: For those who love style but refuse fast fashion. Swap clothes, share styling tips, and celebrate ethical brands and second-hand finds.

communities.name: Backyard Growers
communities.description: Growing your own food, composting, and sharing the harvest. Connect with urban gardeners and learn how to reduce food waste at home.
communities.recentActivity: Seed library is now open for swaps

communities.name: Second Life Electronics
communities.description: Giving electronics a second life through repair, upcycling, and responsible recycling. Reduce e-waste and share knowledge about tech longevity.

communities.name: Neighbourhood Exchange
communities.description: Hyperlocal community for sharing tools, borrowing items, and connecting with neighbours who believe in sharing over owning.

communities.name: Conscious Consumers
communities.description: A general community for anyone working toward more intentional consumption. Discuss sustainable habits, share resources, and support each other.

communityPosts.content: Just finished our monthly swap — 87 items found new homes! Thanks to everyone who came out.
Week 2 of the 30-day challenge done! Already cleared out 14 items. Who else is participating?
Added a power drill and pressure washer to the tool library. Available for anyone in the group to borrow!
Found the most amazing linen jacket at the op shop today for $4. This is why we thrift!
Tomato seedlings are ready to share — I have about 20 extras. DM me if you want some!

challenges.title: 30-Day Declutter Challenge
challenges.description: Remove one item per day for 30 days. Post your progress and inspire others!

challenges.title: No-Buy November
challenges.description: Commit to not buying anything non-essential for a month and share alternatives you found.

challenges.title: Capsule Wardrobe Sprint
challenges.description: Cut your wardrobe to 33 items. Document the journey and what you learned.

donations.title: Children's books bundle
donations.description: 20+ children's books for ages 3-8. Perfect for schools or families in need.

donations.title: Winter coats (adults)
donations.description: 3 winter coats in good condition, sizes M and L. Ideal for charity.

supportPosts.title: Struggling to let go of sentimental items
supportPosts.content: I've been trying to declutter for months but keep getting stuck on things with memories attached. Any advice?

supportPosts.title: How do I convince my partner to join the journey?
supportPosts.content: I want to live more minimally but my partner loves keeping everything. How do you navigate this as a couple?
